final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing infographic for a technical tutorial on deploying Hermes in a Docker container and integrating GLMCodingPlan.

Style/medium: clean flat vector infographic, technical documentation style, numbered step-by-step layout
Subject: four-step deployment workflow diagram showing Docker container setup, Hermes installation, GLMCodingPlan integration, and verification
Composition: vertical layout with four numbered sections (1-2-3-4), each step in its own bordered panel, icons and arrows connecting steps
Color palette: Docker blue (#2496ED) as primary, neutral gray for containers, green for success states, white background
Text (verbatim): "如何在docker容器里部署hermes，并且接入glmcodingplan"
Constraints: must be readable at web resolution; each step must have a clear number badge (1, 2, 3, 4); arrows must show flow direction
Avoid: photorealistic textures; cluttered 3D renders; decorative elements without function; watermark; 8K stuffer words

raw:

Text (verbatim): "如何在docker容器里部署hermes，并且接入glmcodingplan"
Constraints: must be readable at web resolution; each step must have a clear number badge (1, 2, 3, 4); arrows must show flow direction
